name: Gingerbread Layer Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1 In a small bowl combine the honey, ginger, cinnamon, and cloves.
2 In a large bowl stir together the flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
3 In a large mixing bowl cream the brown sugar and butter until the mixture is light and fluffy.
4 Gradually beat in the honey mixture into the brown sugar mixture, using high speed of electric mixer.
5 Add the egg and lemon peel; mix well.
6 Add the flour mixture and buttermilk alternately, stirring well after each addition.
7 Pour batter into 2 greased and lightly floured 8 x 1 1/2-inch round baking pans.
8 Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes.
9 Cool cakes in pans for 10 minutes. Turn out onto wire rack; cool completely.
10 Whip cream with the granulated sugar until soft peaks form.
11 Spread one layer of cake with part of the whipped cream. Sprinkle with half of the shredded orange peel and half the grated chocolate.
12 Frost top and sides with remaining whipped cream; sprinkle with remaining shredded orange peel and grated chocolate.
13 Chill at least one hour in the refrigerator.
